hotel_name: El Conquistador Tucson, A Hilton Resort

reviews.title: Not too great.
reviews.text: Rooms where about the same as a best western.    Nothing too fancy.   The place was once a great resort but hilton has not maintained it well.   Nothin to write home about for sure.
reviews.room_type: 1 KING POOL VW - SOFA BED - PATIO OR BALCONY

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: The shower knob was broke. To the shower so we had to struggle to turn the water on . The restroom faucet was leaking and it looked Ike mold on the wall . Also we tried to order room service at 530 pm and was told no because they was no time to put in the order

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text:
This is primarily a hotel that charges as a resort with daily resort fees of 29$ per room per day.
 Daily Yoga is advertised but the only yoga available was chair yoga on 3 days a week as well as some meditation sessions. 
Housekeeping and valet staff were very friendly and helpful. Resort does offer free parking. Front desk staff and waitresses at the main restaurant were less willing to be helpful.
 We ate at Epazote on Christmas Day. No effort was made to make this special in any way. My entree was a piece of salmon smaller than a deck of cards. It was over cooked and came with 5 spears of asparagus for 30US$ The milk for our tea curdled & we were told it was because the tea was too hot. We disagreed & requested a new cup and different milk and waited a long time for it to come. The restaurant was not busy and did not seem short staffed.
The location in oro valley is nice and the resort has a good deal for guests at the golf course $45 for 9 holes including cart and rental clubs. We were also able to book a tennis court for another fee. The resort offers 2 hour daily bicycle use for free but there are no trails to ride on, only the roads circling the resort. This was misleading in the advertising. Gym was decent and sauna was nice. Overall restaurants were pricy as was the stay for what you get. Beds were comfortable and rooms were fine. Overall not worth the price.

reviews.title: A 100% disappointment. My son even said he's stayed at basic 3 star hotels that were better.
reviews.positives: The location was good if we stayed in Oro Valley.
reviews.negatives: The TV didn't work properly our entire stay. The room was very basic. There weren't even any hooks to hang our towels. We could hear other gets through the room walls. Little kids were running up and down the hallway and banging on our door. Your entire lobby smelled like manure. It smelled so bad, and I had to hold my breath when walking through it. The only good thing about your property is your pool. Otherwise, a complete disappointment and not even close to being worth what I paid. I will make sure to tell family and friends to stay at any other resort than yours.

reviews.title: Beautiful mountains but that’s it.
reviews.text: The hotel is overpriced for what you get. We paid $*** a night because our daughter was running in the marathon that the hotel was sponsoring and thought it would make everything more convenient. It absolutely did not, and the room was outdated and not nice. The hotel needs a complete renovation and higher quality finishes in the room for this price point.

reviews.title: Terrible costumer service.
reviews.positives: The mountain view
reviews.negatives: Lack of security which led to a massive Brawl poolside in front of my kids

reviews.title: Lovely resort
reviews.text:
The staff was incredible. Facilities are very well kept. Restaurants are amazing. The only thing negative I will say is the rooms were very dusty (in the corners of the rooms like the carpet hadn't been cleaned in ages, 
and on all surfaces) and I have extraordinary allergies so it made my stay very itchy and uncomfortable... Other than that - absolutely wonderful facility, staff was amazing. Epazote was unreal food. Room service was also great. Highly recommend.
reviews.room_type: 1 KING BED CASITA SUITE - LIVING ROOM - PATIO

reviews.title: Never will stay there again
reviews.positives: The property was beautiful
reviews.negatives: The beds are very uncomfortable. I will  never stay there again, but inside is rundown. It needs to be remodeled molding on the patio is coming off the pool deck and needs to be done better for the money you pay. It should be a lot better than what it is. I used to stay there years ago and it was so beautiful now it’s just a dive

reviews.title: Majestic mountain views
reviews.text: Great views and a great place to cool down! Many dining options and was magical at night. The pool became a bit crowded with mostly children, so if you aren't into hearing that, you may stay away during the evening. The restaurant experience was great and they had vegan options for my SO which was a relief. I wouldn't recommend the crab appetizer, but all other meals were delicious. We will be coming back for a longer stay in the future, especially to check out the horseback adventures!

reviews.title: Would not recommend too expensive to be treated like a guest at Motel 6
reviews.positives: Location view
reviews.negatives:
Staff could care less, had an event and the bartender was horrible no personality.
Staff at main bar were not good and ignored you even though there were only 3 people at the bar.
Couldn’t get ANYONE on the phone from our room.

reviews.title: This Hotel/Resort is BEAUTIFUL! Extremely clean. Wonderful personnel.
reviews.text: I had the pleasure of meeting with Michael, Tabatha and Jasmine. They were very accommodating and friendly.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Beautiful view
reviews.negatives: Gave us the room at 6 PM or later lost track had to go bug them to give me my room since they claimed they would send a text. When arrived to the room since there was a storm and pools closed early the room was 90• degrees inside and AC wasn’t working

reviews.title: Ok. Could’ve been better.
reviews.positives: The views
reviews.negatives: There was bugs on our bed. Reported it to staff and they said it was “normal”

reviews.title: Don’t waste your money
reviews.positives: Nothing!!!! roaches in my room, and some tile of black little Beatles all around the room, gross and for 400.00 the night, not doing it again
reviews.negatives: Everything, was awful

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Very old- outdated- musty smell

reviews.title: Run down and dirty
reviews.positives: Beautiful surroundings.
reviews.negatives: Dirty and run down. Cockroaches in room right when we walked in. Called front desk to remove. Woke up the next morning to two new cockroaches! Disturbing. We checked out. Also wallpaper was peeling, a big cup of cigarette butts was left on patio and vent was hanging from ceiling in bathroom. Rundown for $400 a night! Super disappointed. My friend was visiting from out of state. Not the Arizona I wanted her to experience.

reviews.title: I’d never go back
reviews.positives: Location was good. Food was good, waitstaff very nice
reviews.negatives: Elevators and hallways dirty. Our first room had a torn curtain and a broken lamp, stains in the bathtub, and when we asked for a different room, there was a hole in the carpet! And the tub had been patched. The dining room had a big hole in the wood floor! This is a Hilton?

reviews.title: I will report when i confirm if one of our belongings missing
reviews.positives: cleaning stuff just entering the rooms without permission
reviews.negatives:
My personal stuff like food and drinks from my plastic and refrigerator was been removed by the cleaning lady even though we are not scheduled check out yet. When i confronted her she just said it was a mistake for the room # that needed to be cleaned on
that day. Our stuff is just scattered all around the room.

reviews.title: You have a beautiful property, but horrible accommodations. Definitely way below standards for a resort. Exceptional ser
reviews.positives: The location and the service staff was exceptional!
reviews.negatives: The rooms were outdated, dirty as there was  dust everywhere. Just like last year but even worse there were less lounge chairs and less umbrellas. Everyone was complaining. You shouldn’t have to get down to the pool at 6 AM to reserve a chair sitting on the grass. The first day at my age is not an option. Overall Very disappointed. I will pay more money and stay at the Ritz next year. You guys are going to lose a lot of business. I spoke too many patrons  that it was their first time there and they won’t be back. You have a beautiful property, but horrible accommodations. Definitely way below standards for a resort. Excellent service staff the management doesn’t seem to really care how people’s experience is. You don’t really see them until there’s a problem just like last year the hopes that the place would improve it did not it actually was worse. On a Fourth of July holiday you would think that the Hilton would want to make a great impression. I was surprised that people were allowed to bring their own alcohol to the pool area. There is zero security. Anyone could walk in there and your restaurant again the service staff was amazing. However the restaurant should be open until 10 PM as people want to watch the fireworks and not have to be rushed to eat dinner and miss the fireworks. The kids enjoyed the festivities.

reviews.positives: The kids pool, restaurants and views
reviews.negatives: The front desk staff had no idea what they were doing, were not accommodating at all and rude.

reviews.title: Won’t be back
reviews.negatives: The carpet inside the room was filthy they need to be shampooed monthly weekly something because our feet stayed black or our new socks . No parking for us guest was horrible absolutely the worse

reviews.title: It’s was nice but for the cost, I’d probably go somewhere else.
reviews.positives: It’s big & resort like. Very pretty grounds.
reviews.negatives: The pool closes at 10pm. Not a suggested time but a staff member walking around letting you know you had x amount of time remaining. At the cost per night of this place, I’d like to enjoy the pool later especially since it was 104 all day & the only enjoyable time to be outside was later in the evening, so not giving you a lot of time at the pool.

reviews.title: Definitely was not worth the price.
reviews.positives: The views were beautiful! SpaWell is the best thing about this place.
reviews.negatives: It felt very old, for example; rust around the pool and lots of damage to the walls. The hot water was out when I showered and my toilet was broken. The Air Force personnel in my building were incredibly loud all night.

reviews.title: Was not a good experience.
reviews.positives: The views
reviews.negatives:
Wasn’t clean enough 
Stuff was rude

reviews.title: The place is run down
reviews.positives: The view
reviews.negatives: Room was dusty, window seals were filled with dirt and bugs. Tooo many people in the pool! Water was murky. Son has a horrendous rash from it

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: It’s beautiful
reviews.negatives: Cuz of lightning pool was closed all weekend. And there was a convention so the lobby and bar where full we spent the weekend in the room.. had no fun at all

reviews.title: Not worth the price at all
reviews.positives: Other than view nothing was good. Even the view, in our room we didn’t have it, we were able to experience that beauty only walking outside.
reviews.negatives: We paid $300 which is super pricey for their old and dirty “motel” I’d never call it hotel. There were vomit stains on the carpet in corridors, plus tons of dirt and it seemed it was never vacuumed. Chipped bath tub and dirty with a lot of stains towels. When I book a room it said they had cribs, when we came we got a dirty never ever cleaned pack’n’play (maybe for a lot of people it’s nothing but when you have a hyperactive kid it brings a lot of discomfort). In general everything was so old and dirty o wasn’t expecting that terrible hotel for the highest price in Tucson. Actually, their price made me to make a decision because I thought if it’s expensive it should be nice. But no. I stayed at $100 hotel rooms and they were much cleaner and newer.

reviews.title: Not worth the money. Expecting a much nicer stay! :-( The photos and the stars did not match the resort.
reviews.positives: Pools were ok.
reviews.negatives: Old and run down for the price. Needed a face-lift. Very basic. The body wash and shampoo were empty. One tiny bottle of lotion for 2 people. Room and bathroom needed to be re-done and were not very clean.

reviews.title: Did not enjoy my stay- I would not stay El Conquistador in the future
reviews.positives: Pool
reviews.negatives: In general the staff was not to my satisfaction. The food was terrible. Jacuzzi was not working

reviews.title: Disappointing at the lack of respect shown by Hilton as summed up above.
reviews.positives: Room was spacious enough and clean
reviews.negatives: We were told at check in that the King room we reserved 4 months earlier was not available as there were 3 conferences and they used our room reservation for one of these groups. We were put in a casita with 2 queen rooms. Parking for this was far from the casita and up a fairly steep incline which was less than ideal.  For the price we paid and the fact that we booked 4 MONTHS early, I would have thought our reservation would have been honored. If we had know that our $775.00 reservation (fee + Resort charges) would not been for what we booked, I would have looked elsewhere as there are plenty of nice places to stay in the area. I would suggest you let the guest know in advance when you can't honor a reservation and they can choose whether to be overcharged for something they did not book or provide a refund.

reviews.title: Not coming back !
reviews.negatives: The room had a very bad smell bathroom was not clean door restroom didn’t close properly.  Bed  skirt dirty and torn.   Pillows smelled

reviews.title: I made it a Good experience but wouldn’t come back
reviews.positives: The view I could see from my room of the Mountains at night and in the day
reviews.negatives:
1) Hall ways were dirty stuff all over the place 
2) dirty pool 
3) trash by the doors smelled

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Nice mountain views, pretty grounds. Coffee shop opens at 6am, which is great. Nice hiking trail within walking distance.
reviews.negatives: Subpar food and menu is a deal killer.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Poor Decoration, with basic equipment. View hidden behind a high tree.
reviews.negatives: Colors and decorations not modern. Room different than the picture online. Pictures online looks modern but are physically old.

reviews.title: It was a big disappointment even though we paid extra to get an additional bedroom to our king-bed suite casita.
reviews.positives: The casita we requested was a decent size and very spacious. The location was excellent and beautiful.
reviews.negatives:
When we went into the room, we immediately noticed that the room was very stuffy and almost no AC, so it was very uncomfortable. It was also dusty and gave us the impression that the room had been vacant for a while. The hotel should have prepared the room before our arrival, but it had not. There were stains everywhere on the carpet, and the overall impression of the room was unclean. My husband actually did the fridge maintenance himself for the hotel, instead of having them do so. We had two fridges, and both of them had accumulated ice in the freezers that we felt like we were staying at a motel. Lack of maintenance was our main issues with the room(s). The restaurant was decent. Regarding the hotel staff, some were pleasant while others could improve on their guest-relationship skills.

We started our trip in Chicago and headed to Tampa to Tucson and finished in San Diego. While staying at the hotel in Tucson, we became concerned that the consistent room issues we experienced in Tampa and Tucson were perhaps due to the reservations we made through the Bookings.com that we were not taken seriously and had been given rather low-grade rooms… could it be due to the discounted accommodation fees? However, we did not get so much discount and paid a fair price for each accommodation.

We would have liked to stay in clean and up-kept rooms, rather than outdated and somewhat unclean rooms though they were spacious, and we were more than happy to pay for what we were expecting from these hotels in Tampa and Tucson.

We usually book through the United.com, but for the convenience of bookings and other coordination purposes, we used the Bookings.com this time to make these reservations. We were disappointed until we arrived at our final hotel in San Diego, CA. Perhaps, we were familiar with the five-star hotel with many compliments by our friends and associates in the past that we knew that the hotel would keep its reputation.

reviews.title: One and Done
reviews.positives: The location was perfect. We chose this staycation for our 56th wedding anniversary. We loved all the palm trees and being near Pusch Ridge. The property grounds were beautiful. They did provide 2 bottles of water per day. They quickly sent someone to address a television problem.
reviews.negatives: We first reserved a king (maybe queen, can't remember) room with a balcony. Then were offered an upgrade to a "king size bed junior suite." Took that, as it was a discounted extra $30 per night. We were disappointed with the room, which really wasn't much more than a king or queen room. The bathroom only had one sink & not much counter space. They added in 2 chairs & 2 small sofas. I guess those "living area" additions were what made it an upgrade. We've stayed in hotels where all this was standard. We'd not upgrade again, knowing this in advance. The elevators didn't cover all the floors, making it difficult to get luggage up to a 3rd floor room. The coffee maker had a weird system for usage that wasn't worth the time to figure out. But the major issue was the added costs. Their Spa isn't in the main building, but about 1 mile away. No free wifi, from the dining for breakfast & dinner, twice each, along with a few drinks we racked up $1000! It was all so expensive, even despite things being more expensive in general right now. It's the day after check-out and I still don't have the receipt for it all that they were supposed to send via email. Anyway, we wouldn't go here again.

reviews.title: Below average
reviews.positives: Always love going there
reviews.negatives: Slide and hot tub were closed and they did not tell us. This time was a total ripoff

reviews.title: Valet had a long line to where you had to wait to check in. Once we got with valet employee was rude. Once we got dress
reviews.positives: Room was a good size, loved the pillows, the pool was nice
reviews.negatives: Valet was bad not great customer service, rush hour. Restroom in room was okay think it would have been cleaned better in the bath.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Beautiful place
reviews.negatives: My family did a trip here drove 3 hours just to stay here had a really good time but due to a GM abusing her power we left. Make sure to not buy anything there cause they’ll tell you it’s not allowed at the pool at least that’s what we we’re told amongst other things

reviews.title: Less than I expected
reviews.positives: Too expensive.  Ate in room
reviews.negatives: Facility was not as advertised.   There was no golf , tennis or hiking trails on the site.  Pool was dirty.  Service slow.   I will not go back

reviews.title: Price for the value.
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives:
Outdated furniture and carpets.
Warned out bathroom doors.
Outdated tile.
Bathroom did not seem to be cleaned properly by housekeepers.
Significant amount of dust and dirt under beds.
Outdated lighting.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Pretty view
reviews.negatives: Old and dated, overpriced

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: We love the place that is why we go back
reviews.negatives: This time around , we did not get our request and when we asked the cleaning staff, they passed the buck around. Finally we got our extra towels but it was too late and the room was not picked up the way they usually are. The bed was not even done correctly and the pillows were not even in its proper way on top of the bed.  We just felt that the service was down this time around.

reviews.title: Very comfortable bed and villa. Nice and private. But the pool was actually horrible
reviews.positives: The hotel room was super comfortable and nice
reviews.negatives: The pool was horribly dirty and it’s like they didn’t have enough chairs for everyone. But I couldn’t believe the dirtiness of the pool and pool area.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: it's a beautiful resort loved the scenery and the rooms
reviews.negatives:
all amenities were not available 
the pools were closed the hot tub as well
no tennis court open
no bikes were lent out and it was barely 7pm
no floating Shrek movie
the check in is so late

reviews.title: I would not have stayed there if I have known the location of my room.
reviews.positives: People and staff was very nice and pleasant
reviews.negatives: I did not like the location of our room, it would have been nice to have a view of the golf course without the shrubs in our face from the patio. Didn't like being so far from the pool. I also think a better job could have been done keeping the people that weren't staying there out of the pool. There were so many people in the pool without wrist bands. I would have like being closer to the restaurants,

reviews.title: Overpriced for a room at the back of the property that was inconvenient for in and out purposes.
reviews.positives: The location was very close to where we needed to be.
reviews.negatives: The rooms are not close enough to the parking areas.  It seems like you are close, but if you have to go up or down from the lot, it makes the journey that much harder with kids/luggage, every day in and out

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: It was a nice resort
reviews.negatives: The security gate didn’t work with the room key. Went to the desk and told them  and got a new key. Gate still wouldn’t open with the new key. Thankfully people or staff passed by to let us in or would have been stuck outside with 2 small kids.

reviews.title: Just ok
reviews.positives: Great bar area and food
reviews.negatives: The carpets in my room were very stained and the room smelled.  Fortunately I was gone a lot for work

reviews.title: A bit pricy for what I expected, but overall it was a decent stay.
reviews.positives: It was surrounded by a beautiful mountain ridge, and everything on the property was fairly centralized. Also, even though it was North of Tucson, many restaurants and stores were still close to the resort.
reviews.negatives: the cleanliness left a bit to be desired. Sunday morning we went to go use the pools around 0845 and there were tons of dead grasshoppers either in the pool waters of each pool or on the pool deck. I figured they would’ve done pool maintenance/cleaning before the pools opened at 0700 but it left a bad impression on me that they just allowed that to happen.

reviews.title: El Conquistador Resort - oldie but goody
reviews.positives: Room was large & spacious, bed comfortable. Staff was friendly and helpful. Included was bike rental, golf & 10% discount at gift shop (we didnt use - too busy). Nice rain shower & hand held shower head. Mini frig. Lots of charging ports. Nice decor in room & entire hotel!!!
reviews.negatives: Bed skirt very worn. Ice bucket was dirty or rust stained. Coffee pot made a mess. No guests allowed in pool area. No microwave. Everything closes at 9 pm!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Great location, beautiful property.
reviews.negatives: We came on an extremely busy Saturday night so couldn’t get service at the bar - a server wouldn’t even make eye contact with me. Then the following day was trying to get a menu item and staff wouldn’t help me. I called and talked to the Food service manager and he brought it straight up to our room, which was very much appreciated!  Pools weren’t heated except the hot tub. Room was clean, adequate, mediocre for the price.

reviews.title: Okay but too pricey for what we got.
reviews.positives: Quiet, comfortable beds, on-site restaurants, landscaping and birds!
reviews.negatives: Parking in a loose asphalt lot a bit of a distance from the lodging, steps to the lodging. Not especially clean. Dated.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: The pool was too busy and not monitored.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The food ,the view and the bed. Reverse happy hour was a plus .
reviews.negatives: The pool was dirty and the spa was dirty. Had not been filtered or cleaned all weekend. Wads of long hair and crud throughout.Plastic cups and water bottles were at the bottom.The gate to the spa was rusted and jagged at the bottom. There were hardly any loungers, the umbrellas were all bent and broken and the chairs were mis-machined.. The toiletries were empty. The bed skirt was 3 inches too long and the sheets and pool towels were stained .

reviews.title: It was a very relaxing weekend but casistas need exterminating
reviews.positives: Beautiful. Fun staff. Water slide is fun even for adults
reviews.negatives: Baby roaches in bathtub, trash around and in pool, rooms never seemed to cool down, small hot tubs

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The casita rooms were very spacious!
reviews.negatives: It is an older property so it felt old. The carpet in the rooms were extremely dirty! And the pool decking needed to be power washed. The pool gates where also very rusted and there was just a lot of wear and tear

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: It was a wonderful stay. The place needs some touch up but other than that it was great. I love the location because there were plenty of options to eat. The amenities were nice from the multiple pools and jacuzzi.

reviews.title: Nice place but could have been much better
reviews.positives: The staff in every part of the resort were all super friendly. The grounds were beautiful. Rooms were clean.
reviews.negatives: There was a bee infestation at the pool area in the afternoon. Never seen anything like it. No one working at the pool area seemed overly concerned. I was told, "it happens. We tried to control it." Customers trash and food trays were left out and were magnets for the bees. Couldn't enjoy the pool that day. Also, the carpet in the building 4 hallway was old and had a mildew smell to it.

reviews.title: Enjoyed it and the views around the resort!
reviews.positives: The view at the pool was amazing! Staff were very friendly and helpful!
reviews.negatives: The bar good place by the pool opened up at 11. Might be nicer if it opened earlier!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The area, it was quiet and relaxing. It was beautiful in the morning with how foggy it was with the mountains.
reviews.negatives: The hot tub was down for maintenance and it was roo cold for the pool, spa was fully booked and we were only staying one night so couldn't take advantage of that either.

reviews.title: Overall good but not as good as I was hoping
reviews.positives: Gorgeous resort, friendly staff
reviews.negatives: Ice machine was broken the whole time, multiple kids in the adult 21+ pool all day (heard them screaming in our room, didn’t want to go to pool because of them), wasn’t communicated to us that we could call the front desk for a shuttle from our casita, OVERPRICED

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Beautiful mountains lots of birds and cactus
Horseback riding facility was excellent
reviews.negatives: Hot tub had rocks  in it and waiters sometimes messed up orders

reviews.title: The facilities arw fabulous, so plan to enjoy them along with activities. Don’t expect much from the local staff, coffee
reviews.positives: The grounds were stunning, there were a ton of activities & the flute fireside was just amazing. The housekeeper was the sweetest, and so accommodating! Jared at the restaurant was pretty fabulous too.
reviews.negatives: The front desk staff was quite rude when we pointed out dirty towels & trash in our hallway and chastised us about it instead of thanking us for bringing it to their attention. The young demographic was not well versed in dealing with guests at any age level but their own, and it showed. I got approval for a late checkout that I requested upon booking, but had to “prove it” for them to honor. They spoke negatively of the “Third party booking site” and said they couldn’t help us whatsoever. So staff was VERY dissapointing other than the housekeeper who was lovely.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Unbelievable scenic beauty.
reviews.negatives: Liked everything.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Beautiful large resort property
reviews.negatives: Resort fee (not much value other than parking). Pool was too cold.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: The only thing that was a bit of an inconvenience was when it was time to sleep. The AC wasn’t cool enough and there was a sound that came in waves from I’m not sure where . The top of the building or in between but I can compare it to the sound of a loud generator in loud waves . Other than that we enjoyed the place just didn’t get enough sleep because of the sound .

reviews.title: Very good for our large group of 9
reviews.positives: Good
reviews.negatives: Slightly tired looking decor

reviews.title: Great getaway for adults and families! There is an adult only section. Spectacular place to stay.
reviews.positives: The landscape is spectacular makes you feel like I’m on a beach. The swimming pools are well maintained throughout the day.
reviews.negatives: My room was still dirty from the prior guest. Mirrors and windows were not clean and the bathroom had hair.

reviews.title: Beautiful view and relaxing atmosphere
reviews.positives: We had a relaxing time in this beautiful resort with an amazing view of mnt Lemmon, decent pool, and well kept public areas. Our room was clean, quiet and spacious with a wonderful view on resort landscaping and short excess to the pool.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Beautiful resort.  Highly recommend for anyone wanting to explore the Arizona desert.

reviews.title: Nice setting.
reviews.positives: The settling is beautiful. The staff were nice and the room was clean. It had a lovely pool.
reviews.negatives: The rooms were very dated.  The parking was not convenient and initially we were not told about the parking in the back lot as we stayed in the 3 building. We found the parking at the back at night and it was not sign posted at all. We ended up parking by the 4 building.  We requested an early check in as we had a wedding at 4:30.  We arrived at 3:15 and were told the room was not ready and we would be texted when it became available. We waited in the lobby and at 4:00 I asked again another receptionist if we could go to our room as we now only had 15 minutes to get ready and she apologized and said she would put me in a room right away.  I had requested a later courtesy checkout on Monday as II had a work meeting at 11:30 and I was told that it was arranged as I am an honors rewards member.  Housekeeping knocked on our door at 11:45 AM.

reviews.title: enjoyed our stay.
reviews.positives: Was good.  Was nice surprise that severed pozole.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Beautiful view
reviews.positives: The views are amazing here and the staff is super friendly
reviews.negatives: The pool got closed down during our stay which was a bummer, and the facility could’ve been cleaner for the cost. But overall the stay was nice

reviews.title: Besides some amenities being closed, my kids and I had a great stay. We would love to visit again.
reviews.positives: Breakfast, the gym, and the pool.
reviews.negatives: The slide was closed and hot tub during our stay.

reviews.title: Very comfortable.. relaxing visit.

reviews.title: Comforting and relaxing
reviews.positives: Front desk staff provided great service and always smiling
reviews.negatives:
Epozote dinner was nursing home bland 
The rice had zero flavor and the refried beans was missing ....beans

reviews.title: It was perfect for a long weekend to relax and spend time with family.
reviews.positives: Beautiful setting with access to some very nice hiking trails.  Staff was friendly and helpful.
reviews.negatives: I had a massage at the connected spa and though the massage was relaxing, it was NOT a deep tissue massage as I had requested.

reviews.title: My reservation shows that the resort fee was included. When I arrived to check in, I was told no. It was charged by the
reviews.positives: It was in a beautiful location looking out at the Catalina Mtns.
reviews.negatives: Around the pool, people were saving seats that were shaded with umbrellas, but no one arrived to use them. We had to sit in the direct sun and we were there. We looked around the pool and saw many with towels on them, but no belongings or people around. One family saved an entire row with 3 umbrellas lined up.

reviews.title: Great price for a short stay cation with my family.
reviews.positives: Pool service was great! Restrooms were clean. The surroundings were great! Friendly staff.
reviews.negatives: The fact that our door key wasn't working 3 times because the battery for the door to enter went dead Sunday. Our room was a little bit of a travel because it was a Casta. No big deal about the Casta, just frustrating when we were having issues with our room door 3 times.  Twice on Saturday and then again on Sunday. Security was able to let us in after about 15 minutes  Sunday after waiting outside in the heat. Our room did have ants in the bathtub when we woke up Sunday morning. Upon arrival and entering our room it smelled like bad BO for a long time. Carpet was dirty and needs cleaning.

reviews.title: I would recommend this property to my friends
reviews.positives: Beautiful property nice staff good food

reviews.title: Trip was rejuvenating
reviews.positives: Beautiful scenery and great location
reviews.negatives: Finding a parking spot was difficult at times

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: Location

reviews.title: Spectacular views of the mountains right next to the pool and hotel!
reviews.positives: It’s beautiful and is in a great location!
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Nice stay!!
reviews.positives: The facilities are great. Very convenient for what we were doing there. Would stay again. We used the fitness center and it was more than adequate.  Staff was great.
reviews.negatives: The whole place just needs a little updating and attention. It’s close to that point where you could get disappointed.

reviews.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: It was slow and our kids enjoyed the water slide without being crowded
reviews.negatives: My wife had an issue with rude attitude from the front desk our first morning there. Her room key was not working and front desk girl was annoyed that it wasn’t working. Wife had to ask multiple times to please reprogram key.

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel and setting that allows our cat to stay with us!
reviews.positives: Beautiful setting, near my relatives, beautiful facilities, and best of all, they allow cats! As long as this resort continues to allow our cat to stay with us, we will be back every year!
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Would stay there again just to deal with Jolene and Lisa at the front desk and Eric at valet service
reviews.positives: The grounds were beautiful, the background (especially at sunset) was stunning. The staff was outstanding, from valet service, to reception desk to housekeeping, to food service; just outstanding.
reviews.negatives: Small things in the room: closet doors off the rails, hand held shower had to be repaired.

reviews.title: Great hotel, great value. Would stay again.
reviews.positives: Staff was friendly and helpful. The room was large and had great views. The bed was very comfortable. Overall it was great for us and easy to travel with a baby. This resort is far better than others of comparable price.
reviews.negatives: Overall, not much could have been better. It would have been a little bit difficult to find our room if we didnt have the help of the bellman. Though our room number implied we were on the 2nd floor, because of the building we were in, we had to go to the 3rd floor. It was no issue but had the bellman not been with us, it might have been a little confusing at first.

reviews.title: Stay in luxury!
reviews.positives: My daughter and I loved the ambiance, plush surroundings, friendly staff. It was just what we needed. So much to do, we need to come back soon. The beds were fantastic!
reviews.negatives: No automatic doors but if that's the worst thing, it was not a big deal at all!!

reviews.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: Definitely the cold/hot springs. The whole atmosphere was beautiful all day. They held events everyday we were there which were pretty nice. The room service was very nice, I ordered their 14” pie with chilli glaze wings. All in all my experience was 10/10

reviews.title: Relaxing

reviews.title: Love the place I will be back

reviews.negatives: The pool was pretty dirty. The bottom had lots of debris and dirt

reviews.title: We love staying at this property when in Tucson!!!
reviews.positives: We love the location, scenery/grounds, the pool area with the poolside bar/ music, and great on-sight dining options and lobby/ patio bar for evening relaxing. It is close enough to the city but located outside of it in the foothills with easy access to outdoor recreation.
reviews.negatives: The hallways of the hotel section could be a little cleaner/ updated and the fitness center could use a boost but we love the el conquistador and its friendly staff. Would love if the spa offered mani-pedis.

reviews.title: Fantastic place and close to everything.

reviews.title: If you like to hike and like to be in a quieter, prettier part of Tucson, this is the place to stay!
reviews.positives: What a beautiful property right at the foothills of the Catalina Mountains. I loved that the outdoor pool was heated to a very nice temp. The hot tub was nice and hot with a beautiful view. We are hikers and LOVED the Linda Vista trail that is right next door to the resort. We had breakfast every day at the hotel dinning room. The prices were very reasonable for great food served with complimentary newspapers.
reviews.negatives: room service dishes are left out too long in the hotel room hall ways. We didn't order room service but every day walked down the hall by dishes piled up by other room doors.

reviews.title: A very comfortable property that displayed beautiful paintings by Diana Madaras' beautiful works. As
reviews.positives: Super breakfast selection. Dining also was an excellent experience.. The huge art display by Diana Madaras was an unexpected bonus that really seemed to   raise the quality of my stay. As a result, I made a special journey to her gallery and left with one of her works.
reviews.negatives: The room's shower was below par and the bath tub was  a step back to old fashioned. Walk-in showers are safer and more aesrhetic.

reviews.title: I love the place.

reviews.title: Overall a good experience minus the lack of staff and chairs/shade at the pool.
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Understaffed. The reason for staying at a resort is for the poolside service this time of year. There were not enough chairs, umbrellas, or staff at the pool over the holiday weekend. There is plenty of room to add A LOT more! I also had to clean up the countless trash as there was not enough staff or trash bins. Many of the chairs were broken. Is this hotel going under?

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: We were able to check in earlier than expected and were given a nice room with a private balcony and view of the pool area. Everything was clean and comfortable. The staff was very helpful and friendly. We couldn't ask for anything more. I would highly recommend this place!
reviews.negatives: I'm pretty sure the TVs in the room are not Smart TVs, so I was not able to hook up / stream our Netflix / Hulu. But that was ok. We spent the majority of our time by the pool anyway.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Excellent housekeeping- great staff all around

reviews.title: Spectacular setting, superb meals
reviews.positives: Amazing location against the Catalina Mountains with spectacular scenery & views. The sunset! Resort layout and buildings were beautifully designed with multiple pools & welcoming patios. Staff was superb from check-in to check-out. Menu (dinner & breakfast) was creative, unique, and offered wide selection. Our room was clean & and the bed was very comfortable.
reviews.negatives: Given the design & opulence of the resort, our room was a little ordinary, and featured the most uncomfortable blue armchair imaginable with a brown "pleather" ottoman that offered little comfort. Our balcony/deck would have been a relaxing place to enjoy the view, but the stiff wooden chairs were even more uncomfortable than the chair in the room, and a huge dark stain on the concrete (our guesses kept us entertained for some time) was gross... to put it bluntly. We'll definitely be back because, overall, this is a fantastic place. But our expectations were high, and these "negatives" really stood out against all of the positives.
